generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor component represented in enriched BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator component represented in enriched BIM model"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller component represented in enriched BIM model"
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Model representing BCS components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMStandards
]

instance MDETransformedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representation generated via Model-Driven Engineering from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin state management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DecisionSupportService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine for high-fidelity interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BIMStandards : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling standards for structured asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
]

instance ControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Control capabilities for building systems"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting building performance"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building operations"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for infrastructure management"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support insights for building lifecycle management"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and control via interactive visualization interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance SimulationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and optimization capabilities for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making support to stakeholders in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance LivingLabAECO : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab in AECO domain for simulating, analyzing, and optimizing building operations through integrated cyber-physical data streams, supporting end-to-end lifecycle management from design to operational phases"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController, EnrichedBIMModel, MDETransformedModel, EclipseHono, Ditto, UnrealEngine, BIMStandards
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system implements a model-driven deployment framework with a layered system architecture (Section II) and standardized extension points (Abstract) for managing component integration, resource allocation, and system-wide coordination across heterogeneous infrastructure environments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises four primary stages: (1) Device modeling within BIM environment by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to address BIM's static representation limitations; (2) Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention; (3) Runtime operations involving real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital counterparts, coupled with interactive visualization for Facility Manager monitoring and control; (4) Evolution through modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics for adaptive operational requirements. Governance is role-based, with distinct responsibilities assigned to Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers across lifecycle phases."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Building Information Modeling (BIM) compatibility, Unreal Engine visualization, and adherence to standardized interoperability protocols specified in Section III."
]
